name: Hochrippe Und Sauerkraut (Spareribs and Sauerkraut)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the sauerkraut.
2. Place sauerkraut in a large 4-quart casserole dish.
3. Add 2 quarts hot water.
4. Add uncooked spareribs, paprika, bouillon cubes, caraway seeds, and pepper.
5. Cover and cook over low heat for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Fry the floured bacon slices until crispy.
7. Break the bacon into pieces and add them to the sauerkraut.
8. Remove any bones from the sauce before serving.
9. Serve with dark bread and steins of beer.
